long_description: getting intermittent vsi creation fail pd from several regions (jp-tok-1,eu-fr2-1,us-south-3,br-sao-1,3)
short_description: getting intermittent vsi creation fail pd from several regions (jp-tok-1,eu-fr2-1,us-south-3,br-sao-1,3)
current_status_next_steps:
Problem source identified. Team will work on a fix. In the mean time we will monitor customer cases and inform customers fix will be applied with in 36-48 hours. 
If customer impact is detected, discussion in Teams will reconvene.
customer_facing_impact:
Users may experience intermittent failures when creating CRs, as VSI provisioning is failing during the security group listing step.
Existing VSI are not impacted.
customers_impacted: So far no customers impacted. Only tests.
chronology:
Response Team Participants (add abbrev. role and name as needed)
=====================
SRE(s): Tejsingh Rajput, NIRAJ PATEL, 
DEV:
MGR: Ashish Kapoor
iPOPs: Gopi Selvaraj, Lekshmanan S (IaaS CORE), Balaji Arunagiri (IaaS-CORE)


AVM: Shruti A
Other: santhipriya katakamsetty, Tejsingh Rajput, VISHAL MANSUR

Slack(s): 
#private-dns-cie https://ibm-cloudplatform.slack.com/archives/GS02AML6N/p1765344925863399
#ipops-producion https://ibm-cloudplatform.slack.com/archives/CQWH66SBY/p1765335896123789
MS Teams:  https://teams.microsoft.com/l/meetup-join/19%3ameeting_NzE4NzVhZmUtMjY0Zi00N2MyLWI1ZDAtYmUxMGExNGFkYTUx%40thread.v2/0?context=%7b%22Tid%22%3a%22fcf67057-50c9-4ad4-98f3-ffca64add9e9%22%2c%22Oid%22%3a%227ebaced2-8fba-4d9b-bea9-80fd94c826de%22%7d


Times in UTC
[2025-Dec-10]
05:35 SRE Impact Start
05:35 SRE Sev 3 CIE Confirmed
05:36 AVM Shruti Joining as AVM OnDuty
05:37 AVM is awaiting details from the SRE
05:53 AVM opens up the teams call and ask the SRE to join
05:53 AVM George Nazarov joined as AVM
05:55 SRE We are observing intermittent problem across multiple regions. These are private DNS appliance provisioning workflow problems. Existing appliances are not impacted. No changes were made to the RIAS. Errors logged are related to Create security group: Invalid value for protocol. Value ALL is not among allowed values. First occurrence happened 12 hours ago. 
06:05 AVM No change related was found in Watchtower identified so far. 
06:45 IPops Joined the discussion
06:56 IPops Core team paged the SVM team to join the discussion
07:10 IPops There was a change (feature developed) that supports "all protocol value", which is causing the problem. Typically it was only ICMP/TCP. 
07:30 SRE Problem source is identified. We will start working on a fix that would be available in the next 36-48 hours. Once this is prepared and tested, will be deployed in production. Due to the low impact and the fact it only affects new provisioning, which is very rare for production environments, we are going to change this back to a Normal incident. 
New appliance creation might fail until we roll out the fix with backdated version pinned.Existing appliances nave no impact. Making configuration changes have no impact.
We can not revert the changes easily, as this might cause other services to fail. 




=============================
               FOR AVM REFERENCE
=============================
